# Coordinated Virtue Epistemology

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** 414b6696-d6cf-4673-80c2-cd85cd21e71e
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Can conflicting virtues invalidate knowledge?](can-conflicting-virtues-invalidate-knowledge-antithesis-a24c378e-7d03-4a50-96a7-68088013078e.md)

## Content

**Knowledge is true belief generated by coordinated intellectual virtues**, **A person knows a proposition if their belief arises from the coordination of their intellectual virtues**, **A person knows a proposition if they have justification for believing it**, **A person knows a proposition if the proposition is true**
